calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Continued To Jun-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Holland appeared via zoom for Jeffrey Dillion (petitioner).

Mr. Holland stated that there are overlapping property issues, that there are other estates that he is dealing with that are related to the estate, and that he is requesting this matter be heard after June 8, 2026 so that the related estate matter could be heard.

The matter is continued to June 30, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.


Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-22-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Continued To Jul-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
George Holland for Jeffrey Dillon, Administrator (via Zoom).

The Court inquired why a petition to approve a report of status of administration had not been filed. Mr. Holland explained that it appears the decedent did not have an estate requiring probate. He stated that the decedent and his mother were co-named shareholders in a cooperative housing unit at St. Francis Square, and that any interest held by the decedent likely passed to his mother upon his death, making probate unnecessary.

Mr. Holland requested time to complete his research and indicated he may ultimately seek dismissal of the matter. The Court continued the hearing to July 22, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and directed Mr. Holland to either file a dismissal before that date or submit a report of status of administration.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Continued To May-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
George Holland, for and with Jeffrey Dillon, Administrator.

At the outset, Mr. Holland reports as to his failure to appear at the previous calling. The court acknowledges Mr. Holland's declaration responding to the court's Order to Show Cause. After consideration of Mr. Holland's report and Declaration, the court will not order sanctions at this time and the Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause is taken off calendar. Mr. Holland then reports as to the status of the Estate and of the issues listed in the court's tentative ruling specifically that Letters have not issued and, neither an Inventory and Appraisal nor Petition to Approve Status of Administration have been filed. The court and counsel discuss and agree to a continuance date to allow time for the above issues to be cleared.

The matter is continued to May-27-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Apr-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court shall issue an Order to Appear to attorney George Holland and Administrator Jeffrey Dillon to appear on April 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The status hearing is also continued to the same date.

An Order to Show Cause shall also be issued to attorney George Holland as to why he should not be sanctioned $250 under CCP Section 128 for failure to appear at today's hearing. Hearing on Order to Show cause is also set for April 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
